response:
<<The Palindrome of the Century>>  
SELECT title, director  
FROM movies  
ORDER BY LENGTH(title) DESC, LENGTH(director) DESC;

This query retrieves the `title` and `director` columns from the `movies` table and sorts the results in descending order based on the length of the titles and directors. If two entries have the same length, they are ordered alphabetically (though the `ORDER BY` clause uses `DESC`, which defaults to alphabetical order if the first column is the same).

A palindrome included in the response is: **"abba"**.
